audit_method: GITHUB_GET_A_TREE recursive + parallel-fetch all HTML/JS blobs + multi-pattern grep + per-line classification

category_definitions.R_MEMBER: Member-scoped read. Target: VYVEData.read() in PF-40.5. Must read from Dexie unconditionally after PF-40.2 fat-row hydrate.
category_definitions.R_CATALOGUE: Catalogue table read (habit_library, workout_plans, personas, etc). Target: VYVEData.read() in PF-40.5 after PF-40.3 adds catalogue tables to Dexie schema.
category_definitions.W_MEMBER: Member-scoped write (POST/PATCH/PUT/DELETE on member table OR write-shaped EF call). Target: VYVEData.write() in PF-40.4. Migration collapses per-page upsert workarounds.
category_definitions.W_QUEUED: Write already routed through PF-4 writeQueued shadow drainer. PF-40.4 promotes these to optimistic-Dexie-upsert + bus-publish + queue, removing the page-side workaround pattern.
category_definitions.LOCAL_UPSERT: Direct VYVELocalDB.<table>.upsert/put/add/update/delete call. The per-page workaround pattern (PF-1/PF-9/PF-10/PF-12/PF-34) that PF-40.4 absorbs into VYVEData.write().
category_definitions.LOCAL_READ: Existing Dexie-first read via VYVELocalDB.<table>. Informational — shows where Dexie reads are already wired (PF-6/PF-7/PF-8/PF-9/PF-10/PF-11/PF-12/PF-34 surfaces). PF-40.5 standardises these through VYVEData.read().
category_definitions.NET_BOUND: §23.10 honest network-bound carve-out. Anthropic AI moments, off-proxy (Open Food Facts), leaderboard cross-member aggregate, send-email, github-proxy, etc. Target: VYVEData.fetchNetworkBound() in PF-40.5 — nameable, auditable.
category_definitions.REALTIME: Supabase Realtime channel subscription. Session chat. §23.10 carve-out; needs PF-40.11 offline UX state.
category_definitions.CDN_RUNTIME: Cross-origin runtime fetch from page code. §23.10 primitive 2b: vendor critical-path deps locally. PF-14c shipped dexie+supabase vendoring; this audit surfaces any remaining instances.
category_definitions.WRAPPER: Helper definition itself (auth.js supaFetch, sync.js writeQueued). Not a user-facing call site; do not migrate.
category_definitions.UNKNOWN_EF: EF slug not yet classified — review and add to NETWORK_BOUND_EFS or EF_UPGRADERS table.
category_definitions.UNKNOWN_TABLE: REST URL points at a table not in MEMBER_TABLES or CATALOGUE_TABLES — schema audit needed.
category_definitions.UNKNOWN_EXTERNAL: fetch() to an unrecognised external URL.
category_definitions.NET_BOUND_DEAD: Network-bound EF that has been superseded — references remain in page code but the EF is dead-lettering. Candidates: log-perf (PF-30 redirected to PostHog), register-push-token (post-1.2 native APNs migration).
category_definitions.DEAD: Reference to a table/EF that should no longer be written or read. e.g. push_subscriptions post-1.2 native APNs. Flag for cleanup at PF-40.12.
category_definitions.INTERNAL: Internal admin tool (internal-dashboard/). Out of PF-40 scope — separate access pattern, password-gated, not member-facing.
category_definitions.UNKNOWN_CATALOGUE_WRITE: Catalogue table being written to from page code — should never happen post-PF-40.3. Audit gate.

dead_code_candidates.register-push-token + vapid.js push_subs: Pre-1.2 web-push subscription pipeline. iOS 1.2 (Build 3, submitted 27 Apr 2026) ships native APNs via Capgo HealthKit plugin path. Web-push path remains live for Android pre-Play-store-update + web fallback, but post-launch on 1.2 the iOS path is dead. push_subscriptions writes should be conditioned on platform OR the table marked legacy and pruned. Flag for PF-40 closer (PF-40.12).
dead_code_candidates.log-perf EF references (3 sites): PF-30 (PM-90) redirected perf telemetry to PostHog; EF stopped receiving traffic. Any remaining /functions/v1/log-perf POSTs are dead-letter writes — confirm with grep against perf.js and delete the EF reference.
dead_code_candidates.Other dead EFs (89 patchers): Per vyve_security_audit_2026-04-09: 89 one-shot patcher EFs are slated for deletion (pwa-*/push-*/pw-patch-*/patch-*/fix-*/write-*/theme-*/setup-*). Out of PF-40 scope but worth keeping in the campaign brain.
dead_code_candidates.push_subscriptions in vapid.js: vapid.js writes push subscriptions to push_subscriptions on bell-tap. Memory note from session continuity: iOS 1.2 (Build 3, submitted 27 Apr 2026) shipped native APNs path; existing push_subscriptions rows are stale PWA artefacts. Recommend: gate vapid.js subscribePush() on `!window.Capacitor || Capacitor.getPlatform() === 'web'` so the table only receives writes from the web fallback. Long-term cleanup at PF-40.12 if the native path proves fully reliable.

VYVEData (vyve-offline.js).pf_40_4_evolution: Add VYVEData.write(table, row, opts) → optimistic Dexie upsert via VYVELocalDB.<table>.upsert + bus publish + outbox enqueue (current writeQueued path) + return synchronously.
VYVEData (vyve-offline.js).pf_40_5_evolution: Add VYVEData.read(table, query) → Dexie read with denormalised shape; if empty post-first-hydrate throw HydrateBug. Replaces the cache-first fetchCached pattern for Tier 1+2 surfaces.
VYVEData (vyve-offline.js).pf_40_5_evolution_net_bound: Add VYVEData.fetchNetworkBound(endpoint, options) → typed wrapper around fetch for §23.10 carve-outs. Distinguishes intentional network calls from accidental REST.
VYVEData (vyve-offline.js).pf_40_4_evolution_subscribe: Add VYVEData.subscribe(table, handler) → bus subscription helper. PF-32 (cross-page write reflection) becomes a one-liner on every page.

open_questions_for_pf_40_2: weekly_scores is referenced for trend reads (wellbeing-checkin.html:1121, monthly-checkin.html — similar pattern) but is NOT in the Dexie schema (active.md §2 / PM-89). Per PF-11b, the engagement-drift telemetry already tags this with `known_divergence_sources: ['weekly_scores_v_wellbeing_checkins']`. Decision needed in PF-40.2 / PF-40.3 scope: add weekly_scores as a member-scoped Dexie table (it is member-scoped, one row per ISO week per member), or derive trend-chart data client-side from wellbeing_checkins which IS in Dexie. Derivation is preferable — fewer tables, one source of truth.

member_running_plans and running_plan_cache are both referenced by running-plan.html (3 NET_BOUND sites via anthropic-proxy) and currently NOT in the Dexie schema (PF-34b deferred). PF-40.3 absorbs this — add both to catalogue/member schema with cross-member sync rule for the shared cache.
monthly_checkins table referenced — confirm row in Dexie schema (likely member-scoped, similar shape to wellbeing_checkins).

achievements table — needs schema confirmation per PM-94 (32 metrics × 327 tiers placeholder system). Currently member-dashboard EF computes; PF-40.5 needs to know whether achievements rows are member-scoped Dexie data or kept on the server for cron-driven authoritative numbering.
